title: liatris glandulosa
intro: Liatris glandulosa, also known as the glandular blazing star, is a perennial herb in the sunflower family that is native to the Great Plains region of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Liatris glandulosa include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in reducing fever and relieving sore throats. Herbal preparations of Liatris glandulosa include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall wellness and support the body's natural healing processes.
